description: All failure classification codes with descriptions, severity, retryability, and remediation templates.

classifications.description: A required contract or schema was violated. The system cannot proceed because inputs, outputs, or intermediate artifacts do not conform to their declared contracts.

codes.name: SCHEMA_VIOLATION
codes.description: Artifact does not conform to its declared JSON schema.
codes.remediation_template: Validate the artifact against its schema. Fix all violations before retrying.

codes.name: MISSING_REQUIRED_ARTIFACT
codes.description: A required artifact is missing from the expected path.
codes.remediation_template: Ensure the producing stage completed successfully and wrote the artifact to the expected path.

codes.name: REFERENTIAL_INTEGRITY_BREAK
codes.description: A referenced ID does not exist in the target registry or artifact.
codes.remediation_template: Check all cross-references. Ensure referenced IDs exist in their target registries.

codes.name: INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION
codes.description: An invalid state transition was attempted.
codes.remediation_template: Review the state machine. Only valid transitions are permitted.

codes.name: PINSET_MISMATCH
codes.description: The resolved pinset does not match the expected frozen versions.
codes.remediation_template: Re-resolve pins or verify the pinset was not modified after freezing.

codes.name: STAGE_ORDER_VIOLATION
codes.description: A stage was advanced out of order, skipping a required predecessor.
codes.remediation_template: Complete all prior stages before advancing. No skipping without explicit SKIP + reason.

classifications.description: Verification checks (tests, linting, type checking, gate predicates) did not pass. The artifacts exist but do not meet quality requirements.

codes.name: GATE_PREDICATE_FAIL
codes.description: One or more gate predicates evaluated to FAIL.
codes.remediation_template: Review the gate report. Fix failing predicates and re-evaluate.

codes.name: TEST_FAILURE
codes.description: One or more verification tests failed.
codes.remediation_template: Review test output logs. Fix failing tests and rerun verification.

codes.name: LINT_FAILURE
codes.description: Linting checks produced violations.
codes.remediation_template: Review lint output. Fix all violations or configure appropriate overrides.

codes.name: TYPE_CHECK_FAILURE
codes.description: Type checking produced errors.
codes.remediation_template: Review type checker output. Fix all type errors.

codes.name: COVERAGE_BELOW_THRESHOLD
codes.description: Code coverage fell below the required threshold.
codes.remediation_template: Add tests to increase coverage to the required threshold.

codes.name: HASH_MISMATCH
codes.description: Artifact hash does not match the expected value in the manifest.
codes.remediation_template: Rebuild the artifact. Verify no unauthorized modifications occurred.

codes.name: TEMPLATE_COMPLETENESS_FAIL
codes.description: Rendered template has unresolved placeholders.
codes.remediation_template: Fill all required placeholders in the template. Check the completeness report.

codes.name: PROOF_POINTER_UNRESOLVED
codes.description: A proof pointer references a file or artifact that does not exist.
codes.remediation_template: Ensure all proof artifacts exist at their declared paths.

classifications.description: An execution-time failure that may be resolved by retry, environment fix, or parameter adjustment. The system itself is not broken.

codes.name: FILE_IO_ERROR
codes.description: Failed to read or write a file on disk.
codes.remediation_template: Check file permissions, disk space, and path validity. Retry the operation.

codes.name: TIMEOUT
codes.description: An operation exceeded its configured timeout.
codes.remediation_template: Increase the timeout or optimize the operation. Retry.

codes.name: COMMAND_EXECUTION_FAILURE
codes.description: A verification command exited with a non-zero code due to environment issues.
codes.remediation_template: Check the command environment (dependencies installed, paths correct). Retry.

codes.name: REGISTRY_LOAD_FAILURE
codes.description: Failed to load a registry file.
codes.remediation_template: Verify the registry file exists and is valid JSON. Retry.

codes.name: LOCKFILE_UPDATE_FAILURE
codes.description: Failed to update lockfiles during dependency management.
codes.remediation_template: Check network connectivity and package registry availability. Retry.

codes.name: MIGRATION_APPLY_FAILURE
codes.description: A migration step failed during application.
codes.remediation_template: Review the migration step. Check prerequisites. Rollback and retry if applicable.
